episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 311
episode.description: James & Cliff get you caught up on all the latest in Modern MTGO and paper meta shifts, fast moving card prices, specs to watch and offer up our thoughts on the MTG crypto war and Secret Lair Street Fighter leaks.
